entity_id.description: Entity id to read from. Use `--list` to get a list of available entities in the `entity-type-map` section (and pass empty array for `parameters`)

parameters.description: A list of parameters to read from. Use `["--list"]` to get a list of available `parameters` (in the `entity_params` section) to read along with the entire metadata of the requested entity

return_type.description: The return type for the response, defaults to JSON

tensorfleet-project-path.description: Tensorfleet project directory path. The directory should contain both .tensorfleet and .env files at its root

top_filter.description: Top-level filter to apply to the query
